name: flowspec
description: Codex plugin for compiling confirmed UX discovery into prototype-ready UX Flow Specs.

scripts.render:sample: node scripts/render-flowspec-md.js examples/porting-automation-tango-tmo/expected/ux-flow-spec.json --out examples/porting-automation-tango-tmo/expected/_internal/ux-flow-spec.md && node scripts/generate-traceability.js examples/porting-automation-tango-tmo/expected/ux-flow-spec.json --out examples/porting-automation-tango-tmo/expected/_internal/traceability.md && node scripts/render-prototype-handoff.js examples/porting-automation-tango-tmo/expected/ux-flow-spec.json --out examples/porting-automation-tango-tmo/expected/handoff/prototype-handoff.md
